subcodes.first_line: Praise be to God Who hath revealed that which was hidden and brought forth that which was treasured through the mystery of His guarded Name, which were it to be cast upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی اظهر المکنون و ابرز المخزون بسر اسمه المصون الذی لو یلقی علی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
